  • Uses of MutableStringMappers in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static MutableStringMappers
    MutableStringMappers.from(StringMappers mappers)
    Returns a mutable copy of the StringMappers.
    MutableStringMappers
    MutableStringMappers.put(Class<?> type, StringMapper mapper)
    Sets the function that maps an object of the given type to a String.
    MutableStringMappers
    MutableStringMappers.remove(Class<?> type)
    Removes a mapper for a type.
    MutableStringMappers
    ConfigurationUpdater.stringMappers()
    Returns the configuration used to map contextual values to a String.
